protocol.source_cutoff: returned analysis frame hard-filtered strictly before 2024-01-01
protocol.source_io_disclosure: shared chunk parser may read and immediately discard later rows in the cutoff-crossing chunk; none enters the returned frame or computation
protocol.raw_semantics: completed kline taker-buy base/quote ratios reconstruct buyer centroid; total minus taker-buy quantities reconstruct seller centroid
protocol.mechanism: threshold-free aggressor centroid inversion plus terminal settlement beyond both centroids
protocol.grid: one continuation map and one fixed 12h hold; exact reversal is a falsification control
protocol.entry: completed minute-55 hour enters next minute-00 open; a separate one-row delay control enters minute-05
protocol.contamination_note: new raw representation but all pre-2024 outcomes are exploratory; 2023 is inspected internal selection and 2024+ excluded
protocol.ontology_note: centroids are observed aggregate execution averages; trapped/informed inventory is an economic hypothesis, not an observed account label

novelty_audit.gate: max event Jaccard < 0.50 and max absolute Spearman < 0.80 against simple price/VWAP/taker controls
